speaker: Petr Pavel
text: The right response to populists potentially taking power in major democracies is not exclusion but reliance on checks and balances plus a vibrant civil society; experience shows populists moderate once they bear governing responsibility.
context: Asked about scenarios where Le Pen's RN or Farage could lead France/UK; emphasized respecting voters' will. [word uncertain in source]

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
